name: make-change
description: Shaun King's practical guide to activism and organizing — making the choice to act, building movements, using your gift, learning from failure, and sustaining yourself for the long fight.
useCase: Starting activism, building social movements, organizing for justice, finding your contribution, rebounding from failure, preventing burnout.
knownRisks: Shaun King has been a controversial figure with disputed claims about his background
The book focuses on US-based activism and may not translate to other political contexts
Some organizing strategies (social media, digital activism) may have changed since publication
